## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `pish`
2. Type `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment

- **pish version**: (run `pish --version`)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)
- **Shell**: bash / zsh (and version)
- **OS**: macOS / Linux (and version)
- **Terminal**: iTerm2 / Terminal.app / Alacritty / etc.
- **pi version**: (run `pi --version`)

paste log here

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
